summary: **Fixed!** The off-by-one error in `app/app.py` was in the pagination offset calculation on line 28. The original formula `offset = (page - 1) * per_page - (1 if page > 1 else 0)` caused overlap (page 2 started at ID 10 instead of 11). I replaced it with the standard `offset = (page - 1) * per_page`. Running `test.sh` now passes with "PASS: Pagination is correct across page boundaries".
